meta.main_title: {airport}{showCity, select, yes {, {city}} other {}} ({iata}) Live Arrivals & Departures
meta.main_description: Live flight board at {airport} ({iata}) today: real-time arrivals and departures with flight status, times, delays and gates.
meta.arrivals_description: Live arrivals board at {airport} ({iata}) today: real-time arrivals and departures, flight status, times, delays and gates.
meta.departures_description: Live departures board at {airport} ({iata}) today: real-time departures and arrivals, flight status, times, delays and gates.

home.headline: Live flight boards for 6,000+ airports
home.subline: Arrivals and departures for 6,000+ airports worldwide. Every board shows how fresh its data is.
home.country_desc: Live arrivals and departures for the {count} airports in {country}. Flight status, with the age of the data shown on every board.
home.az_desc: All airports starting with the letter {letter} — live arrivals and departures, with the age of the data shown on every board.
home.faq_iata_q: What is the IATA code for {name}?
home.faq_icao_q: What is the ICAO code for {name}?
home.faq_arrive_q: How early should I arrive at {name}?
home.faq_arrive_a: For international flights, arrive at least 3 hours before departure; for domestic flights, about 2 hours.
home.faq_live_q: How can I see live flights at {name}?
home.faq_live_a: The board on this page shows arrivals and departures for {name} ({iata}). It refreshes every minute while the page is open, and always shows when its data was last updated.
home.footer_tagline: Live airport boards for 6,000+ airports worldwide. Arrivals and departures, with the age of the data shown on every board.
home.city_desc: All airports in {city} ({count}): arrivals and departures, flight status, with the age of the data shown on every board.
home.route_desc: Flights {from} ({iata1}) → {to} ({iata2}): schedule, airlines and flight status, with the age of the data shown on every board.
home.flight_desc: Flight {flight} status: live arrival/departure times, gate, terminal, delays, and real-time tracking.
home.flight_notfound: Flight {flight} not found or not scheduled today.
home.airline_desc: {airline} ({iata}) flights: live status, departures and arrivals, schedule, delays, real-time tracking.
home.airline_none: No active flights for {airline} right now.
home.data_note: Flight times may change — always verify with your airline or the airport.
home.closed_body: {name} stopped handling scheduled flights in {year}, so there is no live board to show.
home.closed_successor: Flights for this city now use <link>{successor}</link>.
home.ns_body: No airline operates scheduled passenger flights from {name}, so there is no departure board to show.
home.ns_nearest: The nearest airport to {name} ({iata}) with scheduled flights is <link>{airport}</link>, about {km} km away.
home.ns_meta: {airport} ({iata}) in {city}, {country}: no scheduled passenger flights. Location, time zone and the nearest airport that does have flights.
home.faq_hasflights_a: No. No airline operates scheduled passenger flights from {name} ({iata}).
home.faq_nearest_q: What is the nearest airport to {name} with scheduled flights?
home.faq_nearest_a: The nearest airport with scheduled passenger flights is {airport} ({code}), about {km} km away.
home.country_split: Of the {count} airports with IATA codes in {country}, {served} have scheduled passenger service as of {date}; the remaining {rest} are airfields with no airline flights.
home.world_split: AirportsBoard tracks {total} airports with IATA codes worldwide. As measured on {date}, {served} of them had scheduled passenger service; the other {rest} are airfields, military bases and private strips with no airline flights.
home.faq_iata_a: The IATA airport code for {name} is {code}.
home.faq_tz_a: The local time zone at {name} ({iata}) is {tz}.
home.faq_deps_a: About {n} scheduled departures were counted at {name} ({iata}) when flight schedules were last measured on {date}.
home.delays_line: Board status as of {m} min ago: {delayed} of {pending} upcoming departures delayed by 15+ minutes.
home.country_split_partial: Of the {count} airports with IATA codes in {country}, at least {served} have scheduled passenger service as of {date}.
home.world_split_partial: AirportsBoard tracks {total} airports with IATA codes worldwide. As measured on {date}, at least {served} of them had scheduled passenger service.

ui.notice_board: Please be at the gate early. The gate closes strictly on schedule.
ui.notice_final: Head to the gate now. Boarding is not allowed once the gate closes.
ui.notice_ontime: Arrive at the airport early to complete all procedures.
ui.notice_delayed: The departure time has changed. Keep an eye on the board.
ui.board_pending: Live board data for this airport is not available right now.
ui.pwa_title: Add AirportsBoard to your Home Screen
ui.pwa_sub: Opens instantly, works like an app.
ui.pwa_ios_hint: Tap Share, then “Add to Home Screen”.

notfound.title: Page not found
notfound.text: We couldn’t find that page. Search for an airport or head back home.

legal.cookie_msg: We use cookies for analytics and advertising.

event.disclaimer: Not affiliated with the organiser, venue or performer. Tickets are sold by the organiser.
event.past_text: The airport boards below are still live — handy for the trip home.
event.postponed: This event has been postponed — check the date with the organiser.
event.hub_desc: Flying to an event? Nearest airports, transfers and live flight boards.
